title: Khan Academy India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Khan Academy India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Khan Academy India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Nagpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Khan Academy India:
Khan Academy India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Khan Academy India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
